title: BRK mRNA-seq quantifying bash script
author: Konstantin von Stromberg
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This script was used to quantify the expression of transcripts from single-end mRNA-seq FASTQ files via the salmon software (https://combine-lab.github.io/salmon/).
steps_raw: This script was used to quantify the expression of transcripts from single-end mRNA-seq FASTQ files via the salmon software (https://combine-lab.github.io/salmon/).
